expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly addresses the case focus by stating Phase 5b’s rubric requires it and discussing the need for evidence of enforcement: result.md says the rubric states “historical analogs must become explicit required-before-ship gates (`[ANALOG-GATE]`)…” and repeats under “What phase5b is required to enforce” that “Historical analogs… must be rendered as explicit `[ANALOG-GATE]` entries…”.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is centered on phase5b checkpoint enforcement and phase5b artifact requirements: execution_notes.md section “What was checked (phase5b checkpoint enforcement)” lists phase5b required artifacts; result.md includes “Phase alignment check” with “Primary phase under test: phase5b” and explains failure due to missing “Required phase5b outputs.”
